candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Impairment of property, plant and equipment and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A-like line exists, but it is a combined depreciation-and-impairment row and is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales specific. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Raw Materials and Consumables'), this does not clearly belong to COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown above financial lines. The only D&A-like row is a combined depreciation-and-impairment operating line and should not be added to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Impairment of property, plant and equipment and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating line at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows, so it appears outside those selected rows rather than embedded within them. However, it combines depreciation with impairment, and the instructions say to ignore impairment rows, so using it as pure XSGA D&A is uncertain.

variables.notes: A separate operating depreciation line exists, but it is bundled with impairment ('Depreciation and Impairment...'). Because the task is to isolate D&A to add separately and impairment should be ignored, conservative output is blank pending manual review.
